    CV

    Ircham Ali

    irchamali@unusia.ac.id
    https://irchamali.github.io
    Jakarta, Indonesia, , US
    Google Scholar ORCID ResearchGate GitHub LinkedIn

    Summary

    Informatics Lecturer and PhD Student in Information Systems

    Education

    • Dr. in Information Systems
      2027
      Diponegoro University
    • M.Kom. in Information Systems
      2020
      Diponegoro University
    • S.Kom. in Information Systems
      2016
      Univ.Pesantren Tinggi Darul Ulum

    Publications

    • Decision Support Systems for Land Suitability Evaluation on Rice Cultivation using ELECTRE Method
      2020
      The 5th International Conference on Energy, Environmental and Information System (ICENIS 2020)
      The result shows that the application of this method is quite effective for decision making so that alternatives are obtained that have the highest land use suitability compared to other alternatives for environmentally friendly rice cultivation.
      View Publication
    • Land-use suitability evaluation for organic rice cultivation using fuzzy-AHP ELECTRE method
      2021
      Register: Jurnal Ilmiah Teknologi Sistem Informasi
      This study's results indicate that integrating the web with fuzzy-AHP ELECTRE is quite effectively applied for decision-making in organic farming.
      View Publication
    • Arduino Microcontroller-Based Automatic Irrigation System for Grape Cultivation
      2025
      Journal of Artificial Intelligence and Engineering Applications (JAIEA)
      The purpose of this research is to design an automatic irrigation system based on soil humidity levels for grapevines that is more adaptable and accurate to support grapevine cultivation in Indonesia's tropical climate.
      View Publication
    • IoT-Based Smart Fertigation System for Citrus Plants using Fuzzy Logic Control
      2025
      Journal of Information Systems and Informatics
      Overall, the IoT–FLC integration provides a more adaptive and eco-efficient irrigation model that promotes sustainable management of water and nutrients in tropical citrus cultivation.
      View Publication

    Presentations

    • Presentation on The 5th International Conference of Energy, Environment, and Information Systems (ICENIS 2020)
      2020
      Diponegoro University
      Semarang, Indonesia
    • Presentation on The 3rd National Conference on Electrical Engineering, Informatics, Industrial Technology, and Creative Media (CENTIVE 2023)
      2023
      Telkom University
      Purwokerto, Indonesia
    • Presentation on The 1st International Seminar on Intelligent Business and Edge-Computing Research (ISIBER 2026)
      2026
      Universitas Siber Asia
      Jakarta, Indonesia
